user.title: Connect to PS4 GoldHEN
user.description: Enter the connection details for your PS4. GoldHEN must be running with the BinLoader and FTP services active.

data_description.ftp_port: Port GoldHEN FTP server listens on (default: 2121)
data_description.goldhen_port: Port GoldHEN HTTP API listens on for power commands (default: 12800)

error.ftp_not_reachable: Cannot reach the PS4 FTP service. Check the IP address and make sure GoldHEN is running with FTP enabled.

init.title: PS4 GoldHEN Settings
init.description: Update the connection settings for your PS4 GoldHEN integration.

data_description.ftp_port: Port GoldHEN FTP server listens on (default: 2121)
data_description.goldhen_port: Port GoldHEN HTTP API listens on for power commands (default: 12800)

error.ftp_not_reachable: Cannot reach the PS4 FTP service. Check the IP address and make sure GoldHEN is running with FTP enabled.
